# Mnguni Project

> Mnguni Project — South African document agent specialising in police clearances, unabridged certificates, and HPCSH subm

Mnguni Project — South African document agent specialising in police clearances, unabridged certificates, and HPCSH submissions for the Korea and China teaching market. Track your documents through every government stage.

## Services

- Current Government Wait Times
- You See What We See
- Choose Your Package
- What Clients Say
- Built From the Inside Out
- Ready to Start?
- The Korea/China Teacher Package
- The Marriage Certificate Run

## Key Information

- **Location:** Pretoria, Gauteng
- **Phone:** +27 60 774 6860
- **Email:** mpumi.mfeka@gmail.com
- **Website:** http://mnguniproject.co.za
